title: True Memoirs of an International Assassin
original_title: True Memoirs of an International Assassin
overview: After a publisher changes a writer's debut novel about a deadly assassin from fiction to nonfiction, the author finds himself thrust into the world of his lead character, and must take on the role of his character for his own survival.
